items.title: Peace Is The Standard, Not The Exception
items.description: For anyone who spent too long believing calm had to be earned through endurance, vigilance, or over-explaining. A reflective illustrated book by Eshra Tikva.

items.title: Peace Felt Strange At First
items.description: A quiet reflective book about learning that calm does not need to be earned and safety does not need to be negotiated.

items.title: Calm Should Not Require Vigilance
items.description: A reflective illustrated book about recognizing unhealthy patterns and choosing peace over constant alertness.

items.title: You Don't Need To Earn Peace
items.description: For readers rebuilding trust in themselves after years of confusion, second-guessing, and over-explaining.

items.title: What If Calm Was Normal
items.description: A reflective companion book about nervous system awareness, emotional clarity, and learning what safety feels like.

items.title: You Can Rest Now
items.description: A quiet illustrated book about protection, safety, and finally putting down what was never yours to carry.

items.title: The Version Of You That Sleeps
items.description: For readers imagining a future where peace feels familiar instead of suspicious.

items.title: What Peace Taught Me
items.description: A literary self-help book about emotional clarity, discernment, and trusting yourself again.

items.title: Peace Is Not Weakness
items.description: A reflective illustrated book about choosing calm over chaos and understanding that quiet is enough.

items.title: The Crisis Ended First
items.description: A quiet book about recognizing what changed when the chaos finally stopped.
